name: Huh Yunjin
description:
Roommate Series 1

You and Yunjin are just roommates—until one miserable morning when she, curled up on the couch in pain, begs you to make an emergency tampon run. Clueless and mortified, you find yourself lost in the feminine hygiene aisle, bombarded with too many options, panicked texts, and a nosy old lady who assumes Yunjin is your girlfriend. By the time you survive the ordeal and return home, triumphant, she takes one look at the box and sighs—you bought the wrong kind.

What starts as laughter turns into something else—a lingering glance, an unexpected warmth, a moment that feels different. And suddenly, you’re wondering… when did being just roommates start feeling like something more?

-

Some wholesome, sappy, real fluffy scenario for Yunjin
